charter: Continue tusq.dev beyond M18 by deriving the next bounded product increment from VISION.md and then executing it through the governed AgentXchain lifecycle.

Dev implements real product/docs/test changes if implementation is needed
QA verifies with repo commands and updates acceptance evidence
No phase loops on already-completed M18 artifacts
